name: brca_pathway_mlp
notes: Pathway-informed MLP using MSigDB Hallmark gene sets (~50 pathways). The first layer is a sparse MaskedLinear connecting each gene only to the pathways it belongs to — a P-NET style inductive bias. Hidden dims [128, 32] are applied after the pathway layer. Tests whether injecting curated biology into the architecture improves on the flat topk1000 MLP (C-index 0.601).
